home.heroEyebrow: Moroccan jewellery house · Cash on delivery
home.heroTitle: Jewellery that elevates you, a shine that never fades
home.heroSubtitle: Gold-tone steel — everyday elegance, delivered to your door. You only pay on receipt.
home.qualityTitle: Precise details, lasting material, an exceptional experience
home.qualityDescription: Every piece is designed as a signature: durable material that won't rust, a lasting radiance, elegance that accompanies you everywhere. Cash on delivery, for complete peace of mind.
home.feature1Desc: Stainless steel gold-tone finish — never tarnishes, never rusts. Brilliant-cut zircons for royal radiance.
home.feature2Desc: Delivery within 24h to 48h across all Moroccan cities; if there is any delay, we will inform you.
home.feature3Desc: Pay only when your order arrives. No online payment — simplicity and trust.
home.aboutP1: GUMÜÇ Royal is a premium jewellery house dedicated to the Moroccan woman. We don't sell products — we contribute to your radiance.
home.aboutP2: Stainless steel, brilliant-cut zircons, gold-tone finish.
home.commitmentText: At GUMÜÇ Royal, every piece is selected with exacting standards: stainless steel that never tarnishes, a radiance designed to last. We believe every woman deserves accessible luxury — safe, uncompromising, an elegance that accompanies her everywhere, day after day.
home.commitmentBadge: Stainless steel — a radiance that never tarnishes.
home.faqDescription: Everything you need to know about ordering, delivery and cash on delivery.
home.faq1A: Choose your piece, add to cart, enter name and phone. Cash on delivery across Morocco.
home.faq2A: Delivery within 24h to 48h across all Moroccan cities; if there is any delay, we will inform you.
home.faq3A: Cash on delivery only. No bank card, no online payment.
home.ctaTitle: Choose your piece — we deliver it to your door.

about.qualityP3: Brilliant-cut zircons — premium radiance without compromise.

productPage.whyHighlight: Gold-tone finish and zircons — luxurious radiance within your reach.
productPage.materialP1: Stainless steel. Resists water, sweat and daily wear.
productPage.materialP2: Gold-tone finish — never tarnishes, never rusts. Brilliant-cut zircons with remarkable sparkle.
productPage.desire_line: For an elegant golden touch that never leaves your look.
productPage.objectionsTitle: So you can order with confidence

bague-lien-eternel.subtitle: A discreet radiance that elevates every day. Stainless steel with gold-tone finish, made for daily wear without ever tarnishing. Keep it for yourself, or gift it to someone who matters.
bague-lien-eternel.desire_line: For an elegant golden touch that never leaves your look.

collier-trefle-lumiere.subtitle: A delicate presence at the neck — elegance and charm. Stainless steel gold-tone finish and brilliant-cut zircons, built to last. For you, or for her when you picture her wearing it.
collier-trefle-lumiere.desire_line: For an elegant golden touch that never leaves your look.

bague-double-signature.subtitle: A bold design, both ends paved with light. Stainless steel gold-tone finish, adjustable and made for everyday wear. Your signature — or the one you choose to give.
bague-double-signature.desire_line: For an elegant golden touch that never leaves your look.

productObjections.a: No. Plated 316L steel — it doesn't rust and won't turn your skin green.
Yes — the glow of gold, without the price of gold.

productFaq.a: Choose your piece, add it to the cart, enter your name, phone and city. Cash on delivery everywhere in Morocco.
No — stainless steel with gold-tone finish. Never rusts, never tarnishes.
Cash on delivery only. Pay when your order arrives. No online payment.
Delivery within 24h to 48h across all Moroccan cities; if there is any delay, we will inform you.

productFaq.q: Is it suitable for daily wear?
productFaq.a: Yes — stainless steel, designed for everyday wear.
For manufacturing defects, contact us within 30 days for an exchange.
